_meta.license: Each reciter's audio is hosted by EveryAyah under the original recording's license. EveryAyah aggregates publicly available recitations; consult https://everyayah.com/recitations_ayat.html for per-reciter terms. Attribution to the reciter and EveryAyah is required when redistributing.
_meta.padding: 3-digit zero-padded surah followed immediately by 3-digit zero-padded ayah (e.g. Q 1:1 -> 001001.mp3)
_meta.verifiedNote: All slug paths in this file were probed via HTTP HEAD against everyayah.com on the verifiedAt date and returned HTTP 200 for the test fixture (Q 1:1).
_meta.noQalunReciter: EveryAyah does not host any Qālūn ʿan Nāfiʿ reciter as of 2026-05-04. The variant panel renders 'audio not available' for the Qālūn row. QUL (qul.tarteel.ai/resources/recitation) hosts Ali al-Huthaify Qālūn but downloads are JS-rendered; that's documented as future-work in docs/research-vision.md.
